data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the delivery state lifecycle requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a delivery state lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete data or API responses that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for tracking delivery states, yet no actual delivery state data is presented in the prior steps, leading to an inconclusive result. The previous exploratory step (uc-need-validate-1) was also blocked due to insufficient evidence, indicating a consistent gap in the necessary data to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of delivery states (pending, sent, delivered, failed, read, cancelled) or related data.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the delivery state lifecycle.
